codeReview.summary: The fix addresses the missing VAL-CROSS-005 coverage by adding a full multi-device relay-churn Playwright spec, including local relay spawn, decoy relay churn mid-sign, symmetry (both directions), and duplicate-connection safeguards via relayHistory/reconnect assertions. The supporting dev-only __iglooTestUpdateRelays hook and observability tests are scoped and aligned with existing test-hook patterns.

sharedStateObservations.observation: runtime-worker procedure compliance signaling is inconsistent: the handoff marks followedProcedure=true, but the logged verification set omits commands explicitly listed in the skill and does not include agent-browser interactive checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/runtime-worker/SKILL.md:22,44,46,49 requires demo-gallery/tsconfig.node and agent-browser expectations; /Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/b48100dd-0e6c-4a7c-90a3-f12e61d1c3c4/handoffs/2026-04-22T17-04-36-071Z__fix-m5-relay-churn-multidevice-spec__68a204af-acd6-4775-9ea9-4e191d0dc7d5.json:14-36 lists only tsconfig.json+vitest+target spec runs, while line 72 reports followedProcedure=true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission convention text says no `.skip` additions, but multi-device specs (including this one) use conditional cargo-gated `test.skip(...)` guards; this rule is currently ambiguous for environment-availability guards.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/b48100dd-0e6c-4a7c-90a3-f12e61d1c3c4/AGENTS.md:67 says no `.skip` additions; src/e2e/multi-device/relay-churn.spec.ts:184 and src/e2e/multi-device/policy-denial-allow-once-retry.spec.ts:202 both use conditional test.skip guards.

sharedStateObservations.observation: A repeat discovery surfaced that AppStateValue.updateRelays is profile/unlock gated and therefore unusable from __iglooTestSeedRuntime contexts; this prompted a new dev hook. That constraint is not clearly captured in shared architecture guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/app/AppStateProvider.tsx:2433-2443 enforces active profile + unlocked payload/password for updateRelays; src/app/AppStateProvider.tsx:3807 adds __iglooTestUpdateRelays bypass for test contexts; handoff notes the same blocker in implementation summary (/Users/plebdev/.factory/missions/b48100dd-0e6c-4a7c-90a3-f12e61d1c3c4/handoffs/2026-04-22T17-04-36-071Z__fix-m5-relay-churn-multidevice-spec__68a204af-acd6-4775-9ea9-4e191d0dc7d5.json:11).

summary: PASS: the fix closes the prior gap by adding the missing relay-churn multi-device spec with deterministic repeated execution evidence and symmetric churn assertions. No blocking code defects were found in the reviewed commit.
